name: Sauteed Fennel and Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the thinly sliced fennel bulbs and sliced zucchini to the skillet.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until the vegetables are cooked through but still crisp-tender, about 7 to 8 minutes.
4. Stir in the balsamic vinegar and chopped fresh oregano.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. This dish can be made ahead of time and reheated when ready to serve.
7. Add the toasted pine nuts and cook over medium heat for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
